features: PURE TRANSPARENCY - Elevate your skincare routine with the unmatched clarity and quality of Pears Transparent Soap, where transparency becomes a symbol of the brand's commitment to authenticity and excellence meticulously crafted for a clear and clean bathing experience.

NATURAL ESSENTIAL OILS - Immerse yourself in a refreshing journey with the natural oils of Rosemary, Lavender, and Thyme. Lather up the Pears Transparent Soap Bar to indulge in the rich, aromatic fragrance, leaving your face and body feeling refreshed and rejuvenated

GENTLE ON THE SKIN - Experience the gentle touch of Pears with its dermatologically tested formula. The Transparent Soap Bar is carefully crafted to be kind to your hands and skin, ensuring a mild and soothing bathing experience.

TRUST IN PEAR'S HERITAGE - Benefit from 200 years of soap-making expertise with Pears. Through a unique process of moulding and maturation, each soap bar attains pure transparency, reflecting the brand's commitment to quality and tradition.

The Ultimate Pears aromatic journey. Test out the Scents with all of our iconic fragrances. With Natural Oils, Lemon extract and mint extract enjoy the diverse scents Pears has to offer. Includes Pears Original Amber Soap Bar 125g, Pears Lemon Soap Bar 125g and Pears Mint Soap Bar 125g.
